message:
test(search): add comprehensive unit test suites for chunk_vector_store and chunking modules

chunk_vector_store.rs (~740 lines of new tests):
- SemanticGenerationStatus: from_str parsing (valid + invalid), serde roundtrip
  for all four variants (Building/Active/Retired/Failed)
- ChunkDirection: direction_to_str/direction_from_str roundtrip, invalid input
- Embedding blob codec: encode/decode f32 roundtrip, empty vector, wrong length
  detection, NaN and infinity rejection
- Cosine similarity: identical vectors (=1.0), orthogonal (=0.0), opposite
  (=-1.0), dimension mismatch (None), empty input (None), zero vector (None)
- L2 normalization: unit vector, uniform distribution, unnormalized rejection,
  empty rejection
- Embedding validation: empty vector, non-finite values, unnormalized, valid
- Integer conversions: u64↔i64, i64→u64 with negative rejection, usize→i64
- Generation lifecycle: register creates Building status, upsert updates
  versions, activate sets Active + timestamps, activate retires previous,
  activate nonexistent fails, active_generation returns None when none active
- Upsert operations: new embedding returns was_update=false, existing returns
  was_update=true, missing generation fails, wrong policy version fails, empty
  embedding fails, NaN embedding fails
- Prune: deletes chunks up to ordinal cutoff, returns 0 when nothing to delete
- Semantic search: empty store, empty query, non-finite query rejection, results
  sorted by score, limit enforcement, dimension mismatch returns empty
- Drift report: empty generation, schema mismatch detection, chunks beyond
  lexical ordinal counting, nonexistent generation failure, non-normalized
  chunk detection via raw SQL insertion
- Serde roundtrips: ChunkVectorHit and ChunkVectorDriftReport

chunking.rs (~1189 lines of new tests):
- Test helpers: make_offset, make_causality, make_egress_event, make_ingress_event
  factories for constructing RecorderEvent fixtures
- ChunkingPolicy: default values validation, custom construction with
  target/max/min/overlap parameters, Debug output
- RecorderOffset: ordering (segment_id major, ordinal minor, byte_offset
  tiebreak), equality, clone, serde roundtrip
- SemanticChunk: construction with all fields, content_hash stability, serde
  roundtrip, overlap serialization
- Chunker: single event produces single chunk, multiple events accumulate,
  chunk boundary at target size, overlap window carryover, empty text events
  skipped, mixed ingress/egress forces boundary, pane_id change forces boundary,
  session_id change forces boundary, flush produces chunk from accumulated buffer
- Edge cases: very long single event exceeding max, exact target size boundary,
  minimum size enforcement, event_ids tracking across chunks

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
